verse_text: For this reason I also suffer these things; nevertheless I am not ashamed, for I know whom I have believed and am persuaded that He is able to keep what I have committed to Him until that Day.

links.context: Preserved in Jesus Christ is a promise of God to all faithful. But not all are so faithful, as Jude will relate in this letter (see [[JOH.10:27]]-30; [[2TI.1:12]]; [[HEB.12:2]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
